entry.title: Re: Best practice to connect to multiple databases (Cryst...
entry.content:
In addition to Jamie's response, you have a couple of options for creating the report.

- If you want to report on each location separately, I would use a separate sub-report for each location.  This will be the easiest way to segregate the data correctly.

- If you want to consolidate the data from all locations, I would use a Command (SQL Select statement) that Unions the same data from each linked database.  For more information about the correct way to work with commands see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/best-practices-when-using-commands-with-crystal-reports/ba-p/13142196.  The post is about 9 years old, but the information is still valid.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration: Switch iflow Type
entry.content:
Hello Simon,

I don't think there is a way to change the iflow type.
However you can edit your REST API flow, select all the flow elements holding SHIFT and click the Copy button on left of the top menu.
Then create a new iflow of the desired type, edit it, select the main integration process and click the Paste button.
Hopefully this saves you some time instead of creating everything again from scratch.

Best Regards,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: CAP odata-v2-adapter: batch request is not supported?
entry.content: @Dinu Thanks for your comment. It makes sense to handle this on the Cloud SDK side, if the "odata-version" header was introduced from OData V4.

entry.title: Re: CAP odata-v2-adapter: batch request is not supported?
entry.content: @OliverKlemenz Thanks for your quick reply. Glad to hear that the issue will be fixed.

entry.title: Re: Demystifying the Common Super Domain for SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: How to add SAP Datasphere as a datastore in Cloud Integration for data services?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to create datastore in CPIDS and making "SAP HANA application cloud" connection type to Datasphere.
The selected application type as "HANA Cloud Platform HANA".

We have Schema and DB users are created in Datasphere. However we are not able to get the access key to establish connection.

How to get access key?

 

Also kindly help us if any documentation available for setting up the same. CPIDS(HCI) agents are on Linux.

 

Thanks

Mahesh V


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add SAP Datasphere as a datastore in Cloud Int...
entry.content:
Use proper Datastore.

To integrate CI-DS and SAP Datasphere, follow the documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration-for-data-services/help-center-for-sap-cloud-integration-for-data-services/datasphere?locale=en-US

There is a specific datastore object for Datasphere, you should use "SAP Datasphere" instead of "SAP Cloud Platform HANA".

entry.title: Re: Improving Time Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: A GenAI Solution
entry.content: Awesome!!

entry.title: Re: BusinessObjects 4.2 SP9 to 4.3 latest version
entry.content:
it is not recommended to do an inplace upgrade.
if you want to do/try this anyway, have fun within with your test-environment.
there is already a lot of information and webinars available about upgrading 4.2-->4.3

entry.title: Where have the options to host AppGyver (community edition) apps at .appgyverapp.com subdomains gone
entry.content:
I have recently noticed that (in the AppGyver community edition), while still being marketed in the "launch" tab, you cannot actually deploy your web app to a .appgyverapp.com subdomain. I'm very used to this feature, but have no idea where it has gone and what the status of the feature is. 

If you go to the “launch” tab in a community edition app, it says "Create mobile builds of your app for distribution, as well as build web applications to be hosted under the appgyverapp domain. Alternatively, you can download the web build as a ZIP file.”.

Does anyone know where this has gone?

entry.title: Re: Merge cells in analysis for office?
entry.content:
you can do this only in your/another Excel-sheet after running the query (e.g. with VBA),
but not within the Analysis-query-design

entry.title: Purchase Requisition - BADI - PROCESS_ITEM - change other items as well
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I implement currently the BAdI ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST to update the PR-items. In my scenario it is necessary that in case of a specific change to the current item, I need to update an append-field in all other items of the PR as well.

I am not sure if this is supported by the mentioned BAdI because it is not working in the moment.

This is my coding which I call in the menthod PROCESS_ITEM.

  ls_data      = io_item->get_data( ).
  ls_data_prev = io_item->get_previous_data( ).
  lo_header    = io_item->get_requisition( ).
  
  " Check if the Material Group has been changed
  CHECK ls_data-matkl NE ls_data_prev-matkl.

  " Get PR-items
  lt_item_obj = lo_header->get_items( ).

  " Process each PR-item
  LOOP AT lt_item_obj ASSIGNING <ls_item_obj>.

    " Get Item-Details
    ls_item = <ls_item_obj>-item->get_data( ).

    " Update ZZ-Field
    ls_item-zzxxx = 'ABC'.
    ls_item->set_data( ls_item ).

ENDLOOP.

I get all the other items using the header-object which leads me then to the list of items and their corresponding object which I use to update the item data.

Did you already try to implement a similar requirement using this BAdI?

I tried as well using method CHECK but I guess here it is not allowed to change the items details anymore. I tried it but w/o success as well.

Thank you very much for every hint/advice

Kind regards
Jens

entry.title: Re: App ID F1706 Change Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

You've tagged your issue to eSPP.  However, after reading your issue, this does not look to be eSPP related.  Within eSPP, we don't manage any app for changing inbound deliveries.  Can you please confirm you've applied the correct tag?  If you believe there is bug please consider submitting an incident so it can be properly routed to the correct component.

Regards,

Chad

entry.title: Sapphire 2024 user experience and application development sessions
entry.content:
I’m excited to return to SAP Sapphire for the first time in several years. As always, Sapphire is about showcasing SAP’s latest innovations. There will be lots to see across the full portfolio, especially all the new AI uses cases that help you make better, more informed business decisions. In this blog post, I will focus on the sessions that highlight user experience and application development, both of which contain varying levels of AI, as SAP is infusing artificial intelligence into most of our solutions.

To deliver a great user experience in SAP /4HANA, we focus on developing simple, intuitive applications using our own tools. We also make these technologies available to customers and partners. We have been making updates across our portfolio of tools and technologies for professional developers:

  • SAPUI5 – added Joule as a helper to write freestyle SAPUI5 applications or custom pages
  • SAP Fiori elements – unlocks efficiency and simplicity for creating apps
  • SAP Fiori tools – introduces generative AI capabilities
  • SAP Business Application Studio – includes many new features to make development easier

AI improves the user experience

At Sapphire, we will be showing some easier ways to find information in your apps, summarize it, and share it with your peers. Please visit the demo stations and expert stations to see the latest released functionality, along with some cool prototypes available to early adopters.

Natural language filtering in SAP Fiori elements apps is one of the AI innovations we will preview at SAP Sapphire 2024.

 

Natural language filtering in SAP Fiori elements apps is one of the AI innovations we will preview at SAP Sapphire 2024.

AI improves developer productivity

For developers, some tasks require great creativity and technical skill to build an app that meets all the user requirements and ideally is fun to use. Artificial intelligence can perform some of the mundane tasks, freeing developers to focus on understanding the user requirements, creating the business logic, and determining how to deliver an engaging experience. We have new AI capabilities in SAP Build Code and SAP Fiori tools, including the ability to create an app directly from a business requirements document. One of our co-innovation partners told us this would save them several days at the start of every project. You can hear more about this and more in the sessions I have listed below.

 

Key UX and application development sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024

If you are looking for more topics beyond UX and app dev, you can find them in the session catalog.

Session #

Day / Time 

Title

Abstract

Presenter(s)

ASUG pre-conference session

Monday, June 3

8:00am – 5:00pm

Unleashing the Power SAP BTP: Maximizing Your SAP Investment Through Innovation and Transformation

Understand how SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) provides tools and solutions to address critical business and technology areas like integration, data and analytics, low-code/no-code customizations, and AI.

Many SAP experts

BTP118

Tuesday, June 4

10:30am – 10:50am

Discover generative AI code-based development from SAP Build Code

See how AI in SAP Build Code is used to generate app logic, data models, and test scripts. Learn all about SAP Build Code, including how it connects smoothly to enterprise systems

Steve Day, SAP

Dimitri Lerner, Henkel

TRE306

Tuesday, June 4

11:00am – 11:20am

AI-augmented development and its impact on your IT organization

AI-augmented development aids software engineers in designing, coding, and testing applications. With rising business demands, teams face backlogs and the need for efficiency.

Yaad Oren, SAP

BAI200

Tuesday, June 4

11:30am – 11:50am

Achieve real-world results with SAP Business AI solutions

Join SAP leaders to uncover how AI delivers real-world results across your business functions reliably and responsibly. Get an update on SAP's AI strategy and learn how companies that have embraced AI.

Philipp Herzig, SAP

TRE321

Tuesday, June 4

11:30am – 11:50am

The new ERP mindset

As changing market dynamics put pressure on traditional businesses, business model innovation becomes imperative. More than ever, businesses need ERP to enable innovation, which involves a change in mindset as much as technology.

Maura Hameroff, SAP

Eric van Rossum, SAP

BTP131

Tuesday, June 4

1:00pm – 1:40pm

The latest in low-code SAP Build solutions

Learn what's new in SAP Build for use in low-code development, including deeper integrations, an improved user experience, and comprehensive AI and generative AI support.

Aviad Rivlin, SAP

BTP116

Tuesday, June 4

2:00pm – 2:20pm

Five key low-code techniques for building effective enterprise apps

Find out how to create and deploy enterprise-grade applications with stunning user interfaces, custom data models, and complex business logic – all within IT governance and operational guardrails

Eric Solberg, SAP

Mark Wright, SAP

BTP201

Tuesday, June 4

3:30pm – 3:50pm

Unleashing the power of generative AI for developers with SAP Build

Understand the paradigm shift generative AI brings to developers and its impact on their productivity and pace of delivery. Learn how they can leverage SAP Build solutions.

Tim Back

ASUG301

Wednesday, June 5

10:30am – 11:10am

Building better applications for business users with SAP Fiori

Hear about best practices for using SAPUI5, SAP Fiori elements, SAP Fiori tools, and SAP Business Application Studio to create enterprise-grade apps for your business users. Find out about practical ways to build and deploy apps quickly, leveraging AI. Come prepared to learn and ask your questions.

Peter Spielvogel, SAP

BAI208

Wednesday, June 5

11:00am – 11:20am

See Joule in action and empower your business

Discover how Joule, the AI copilot from SAP, helps your business get smarter insights and better outcomes, and assists your people in getting their work done faster.

Jana Richter, SAP

BTP119

Wednesday, June 5

11:00am – 11:40am

Application development with SAP Build and SAP Build Code: roadmap review

Find out what's new and what's coming in SAP Build and SAP Build Code solutions for use in fusion development and how they integrate further. Discover upcoming capabilities that improve a builder's efficiency and innovation potential using generative AI across the portfolio.

Nicolas Damonte, SAP

Thomas Volmering, SAP

ASUG303

Wednesday, June 5

1:00pm – 1:40pm

Customer roundtable: migration to SA S/4HANA and adoption of SAP BTP

Using design thinking principles, walk through SAP S/4HANA migration scenarios, explore clean core methodologies, and learn how to maximize SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) to avoid latency. Interact with your peers to discuss lessons learned and best practices for migration.

Peter Keller, SAP

BTP117

Wednesday, June 5

2:00pm – 2:20pm

Generative AI-based code development from SAP Build Code

The SAP Build Code solution, with generative AI–based code development tools and a Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development, provides a turnkey environment for coding, testing, integrations, and application lifecycle management.

Steve Day, SAP

Sid Misra, SAP

BTP130

Wednesday, June 5

2:30pm – 2:50pm

Application extensibility with SAP Build solutions

Learn how to speed up your innovation potential by leveraging the power of low-code and pro-code. See how you can extend processes and applications with SAP Build solutions.

Nicolas Damonte, SAP

Thomas Volmering, SAP

 

See you at Sapphire! If you want to connect and talk about how to improve the UX at your organization, please reach out to me and we can schedule a meeting.

entry.title: Invalid value of "AppName" in MDKProject.json. It should contain only alphanumeric characters
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I have a issue when I try to create a new build job from my MDK App on Mobile Services. 

I modify the files such as MDKProject.json and BrandedSettings.json for build my Mobile Development Kit Client Using MDK SDK. Could someone help me? 

 

Error: Invalid value of "AppName" in MDKProject.json. It should contain only alphanumeric characters and not exceed 80 characters in length.

Best regards,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.content: did you try setting "package size" or "partitioning" to separate this into smaller pieces ?

Hello experts, we are recently developing a couple of things in the SAP HANA CLOUD database

We have experience developing in ORACLE with PL/SQL
We would like to know if the packages exist in Hana as well as in Oracle

Package as database object

Thanks and regards

entry.title: 1H 2024 - VRP-14025 - Enhancements in Compensation Statements
entry.content:
Hi 

As per this release item, it was mentioned as below.

  • Statement recall email notification: The email notification that you receive when statements are recalled for employees now includes their usernames as well as user IDs. Previously, the email notification only had the user IDs.

But when we are testing this feature, both User IDs and employee names are not shown.

I receive the below message in the email.

Is anyone facing this issue and anyone aware of how to fix this or when this will get fixed?

Appreciate any feedback on this.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to create a rolling forecast in SAC? I have an actual and budget version for 2024.
entry.content:
I am trying to build a rolling forecast in SAC. Have seen some instructions but the information is vague.
I have an actual version and a budget version for 2024. 
What prerequisites do I have to build a rolling forecast? I know how to get the forecast layout in a story. If I choose actuals of three months to look back or a cut off date and 15 month to look ahead, how to I get values in the forecasted months?

entry.title: Re: HTTP Receiver adapter with Dynamic value in URL using...
entry.content:
Hallo @Jeevitha_04 ,

You can use expressions in your adapter. You can easily read your headers or exchange properties with camel expressions. For example my123456.hana.ondemand.com/${property.client} or also headers ${header.client}. 

If you need specific example you can write me. 

Best Regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: Bought a new laptop and trying to install Crystal 2016.
entry.content: Crystal Reports licenses typically have a limit on the number of times they can be activated. If you already activated the license on another machine, you may need to deactivate it from that machine before activating it on your new laptop.

Need urgent help on ABAPLINT configuring in ATC central system .

I already configured everything.

Is this something feasible ? 

Regards

VJ

with Rise for SAP Public Cloud Base and Premium you get 2 objects bundled for free. With Premium Plus you get 2 - 25 objects, depending on the amount of FUEs you subscribe.

You can find that in the supplemental terms and conditions in SAP Trust Center.

Cheers

entry.title: Re: RAP Unmanaged scenario OData V4

entry.title: Re: Get started with SAP BTP ABAP Environment: Trial Account vs. Free Tier Option
entry.content: @abo shared trial account can be extended up to 90 days, not beyond. Free tier option is fixed to 90 days

iY31yOKfbO

Before you can start collecting LXP-L points, you need to provide the referral code above, to activate your wallet (e.g. if you are using MetaMask chrome)

entry.title: Re: Expand and Collapse at Group Level for sap.m.Table
entry.content:
sap.m.Table is not intented to display large amounts of data. As a matter of fact, by default sap.m.Table displays only 100 items if growing property with a large growingThreashold is not set.

If you have control over your backend OData service, consider using sap.ui.Table.AnalyticalTable as it has collapse/expand feature on groups. In order to use AnalyticalTable, your OData should be properly annotated. See Table Groupings for more information. 

If you want to stick to sap.m.Table, you can implement a custom group header using groupHeaderFactory property of items binding of the table. Here's how you might want to do it:

  • Bind the visibility of items template (ColumnListItem) to the group key using JSONModel.
  • Include a toggle button inside the custom group header. When the toggle button is pressed, the visibility (bound to group key) of the items of that group can be toggled.
This will work however please keep in mind that this approach might deviate from Ui5's standard design patterns, potentially impacting user experience. Plus, as I've mentioned, sap.m.Table is not designed to display huge amount of data, you would still face performance lags with huge number of rows (even if those are collapsed) when interacting with the table.
 
Regards
Sajid Khan

entry.title: Error in updating order in OData V4 Model from a CAP Project.
entry.content:
I want to update an order in OData V4 Model from a CAP Project.

The order has "array of string" ex : BO_DataTransferContent

var contextActBinding = oDataModel.bindContext('/RequestSet(' + dataObject.ID + ')', undefined, { $$updateGroupId: "$auto" });

Methord1
for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(dataObject)) {
contextActBinding.getBoundContext().setProperty(key, value);
}

error

 

Method 2
for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(dataObject)) {
if (typeof value === 'object') {
contextActBinding.getBoundContext().setProperty(key, JSON.stringify(value));
} else {
contextActBinding.getBoundContext().setProperty(key, value);
}
}

Any Solution?

Thanks in Advance

Dear All

Use OIGN And IGN1

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration: Switch iflow Type
entry.content: Hi Carlos, thanks for the tip. I did not know that. That´s a suitable workaround

entry.title: link chart and table in SAC
entry.content:
Chart_1 is id of a numeric chart shows count of customers. 

Table_1 is id of a table has columns of customer name, Network id.

now upon clicking chart_1 it should redirect to Table _1 to show reference.

entry.title: Duplicate Credit Note Created for one material document via MRER
entry.content:
Hello MM Gurus.

I'm facing an issue while executing MRER transaction, SAP System is generating duplicate credit notes for material document. For example : 2 credit notes generated for 1 material document.

is anyone facing same kind of issue? is this SAP funtionality?

How to prevent this issue in SAP ? Please help with your ideas/experience

 

Thanks

Ramesha Reddy

entry.title: Re: Fiori "Display Supplier List" links fioris w/sensitiv...
entry.content:
Hi Jsainzh, I guess you must be testing with a user that has SAP_ALL or at least very broad authorizations?!

All app-to-app navigation links are controlled by authorizations.  If you are not authorised to use an app it will not appear as a link. So if you use a test user with more realistic authorizations you will find that there are no links to other apps with sensitive data. 

Within an app, if you need to create different variations of the same app for different audiences, usually we would use Adapt UI to create App Variants that can be assigned to the different business roles. 
best

Jocelyn

entry.title: Take over Customer Attributes from Solution Documentation into Test Step Designer
entry.content: Take over customer attributes from Solution Documentation ( Process level) into Test Step Designer. Is this possible ? How to do it ? I assume, this can be defined in customizing. I have already defined customer attributes for Test Step Designer, but they are empty... no attributes taking over from Processes.

entry.title: Re: How to connect service entry sheet created in SAP TM with MM Invoice verification using MIRA
entry.content: This is Standard SAP functionality, MIRA will not support for TM service entry sheets. You have to use MIR7/MIRO for this

entry.title: Re: How to connect service entry sheet created in SAP TM...
entry.content: This is Standard SAP functionality, MIRA will not support for TM service entry sheets. You have to use MIR7/MIRO for this

entry.title: Re: Store attachments from Standard Fiori apps in Archive...
entry.content:
Hi Abdul

Suggest you take a look at S/4HANA Harmonized Document Management (HDM) configuration.  This is a standard part of S/4HANA that brings together multiple attachment services so that from all S/4HANA apps - both SAP Fiori apps and classic Uis such as GUI transactions - you can view or store attachments in the appropriate place based on configuration, without the user having to worry about where the attachment is stored.

entry.title: Re: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Pr...
entry.content:
Hi Ankurbabu. We usually suggest making the Adapt UI change in the Unit Test client where you have the data - publishing it to a customizing transport request. Then use the usual transport options to copy the customizing request back to your master configuration client, from which you then transport the changes to the rest of your landscape 

Best, JD

entry.title: CDS View to Get Billing Document Number and Sales Order Number
entry.content:
Good day!

I would like to ask if there is any available CDS where I can obtain the Billing document number of a specific Sales order. A view where it indicates the specific number of both Sales Order Number & Billing Document Number or Sales Order Number & Invoice Number. I can't seem to find the specific CDS during my own investigation.

Any inputs would be appreciated.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Re: Interface not implemented by method DBEXTRACT in DB C...
entry.content:
Hello,

1. I recommend that you go to Proposal tab of DataSource and press "Default System Proposal" Or go to Fields tab and assign an InfoObject for the changed column (here: External Costs) matching the data type and length.

2. If solution 1 didn't work, you can also check SAP Note 3433077 - The execution of the infopackage ended with the error "InterfaceEXTRACT_DIRECT not implemented by method DBEXTRACT".

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report for Visual Studio 2022 on Windows 11 ARM
entry.content: I used the exe file (CRforVS6413SP35_0-80007712.EXE) started by "Run as Administrator" and kept visual studio closed

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Lingen
entry.content:
Calling all tech enthusiasts in the SAP world!  Join us for an evening of networking, mingling, and tech talk at our casual after-work event!  Whether you're a programmer, an SAP expert, or simply tech-curious, this is your chance to connect with like-minded SAP professionals in a relaxed setting. 

 

 Date: 16.05.2024

 Time: 19.00 Uhr

 Location: Alte Posthalterei, Große Str. 1, 49808 Lingen (Ems), Deutschland

Get ready for an evening filled with stimulating conversations, and the opportunity to expand your SAP network.  Bring your ideas, questions, and business cards – you never know who you might meet! Don't miss out on the chance to unwind, connect, and discover new opportunities in the SAP world. RSVP now to secure your spot!  

 

 Space is limited, so act fast!

entry.title: Re: Creating a Google Big Query connection in SAP Datasphere (DWC)
entry.content:
To fix the issue about drivers you need to upload Simba ODBC drivers in System->Configuration->Data Integration:

For the certificates, upload all the 3 Google certs (CA, Interm. and *google.com) in System->Configuration->Security:

Cheers

Alex

entry.title: Re: Material Consumption API for DMC
entry.content:
Hi,

For Process Industry / Order POD scenarios, see:  https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_processorder/resource/Goods_Issue

For Discrete Industry / Work Center / Operation POD scenarios, see: https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_assembly/resource/

Br,

Manoel

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA CLOUD 2202将彻底弃用项目控制器（CJ20N）
entry.content: @Feng_Chen  请问这个功能对应APP(项目控制-企业项目）的结算规则维护是否有API接口，我们有上百个非统计型项目，手工一个一个维护结算规则，工作量非常大。

entry.title: Re: GET_TEXT_AS_R3TABLE problem
entry.content:
Hi, please check all things below:

  • You need to use method cl_gui_cfw=>flush after calling method get_text_as_r3_table
  • In PBO, before creating object EDITOR, you need to check if it is INITIAL or not.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report for Visual Studio 2022 on Windows 11 ARM
entry.content:
These are the errors in the activitylog.xml file

No InprocServer32 registered for package [VsRptDesigner Package] C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\CRDesigner.dll {C0A76456-F970-471A-B209-8D35F6CD9119} 0x800700c1

No InprocServer32 registered for package [Crystal Reports Tools Package] C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\CRVsPackage.dll {FE73BB80-53F4-4AD0-A5F9-6A0BCE662292} 0x800700c1

entry.title: Re: Consuming on-Premise Service in CAP Project
entry.content: @sPatil I have corrected the link. It looks that a destination service is already defined in the mta.yaml. You also need connectivity service as your backend is on-premise. Additionally, please check that both destination and connectivity services are bound to your service.

entry.title: FM or BAPI for VF03, FB03 attachment list download
entry.content:
Hello!

Which BAPIs or FM shall I use to download GOS attachments (VF03 transaction with billing document number, attachment list)? The attachments are downloaded via http (files are in a web server). Same for FB03 transaction (with supplier invoices).

I mean the “export” functionality that it’s within the attachment list tab. When doing manually (if I double click on attachment itself) my browser is opened and pdf file is shown. I have inspected this and an http request is made to some server, which returns the pdf itself. I have looked some FM such as BDS_GOS_CONNECTIONS_GET (which returns the metadata of the attachments, but cannot download the attachment with that one) and BDS_BUSINESSDOCUMENT_GET_TAB which does not help.

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: B1SLayer: A clean and easy way to consume SAP Business One Service Layer with .NET
entry.content: Am getting such when i try quering data

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

This is Sumathi. I have around 4 years experience in HR administration. I am a mother of a 6 year old boy. I belong to an indigenous community from a small town in south India currently living in the french speaking part of Canada. I am looking for a mid-life career transition and would greatly appreciate an opportunity to upskill in SAP to advance my career. 

Kindly send me the invite code to start my SAP certification. 

Thank you ! 

Sumathi

entry.title: Recording position management: Error during distribution SURE 100000Message no. FTR_TRD012
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am unable to execute TBB1. Images upload where I can't update Accounting principle kindly suggest.

Here Accounting principle not updated, can you help me here?

entry.title: Re: Invoicing plan: No message was found for partner 1000...
entry.content:
a) Go to MRM1 and select output type INS

(b) Select Key combination as Company Code

(c) Enter your compnay code

(d) Enter Funct i.e. Partner as VN (i.e. Vendor)

(e) Enter Medium = 1

(f) Enter Date / Time = 3

Double click and carry out following inputs

(1) Output device = Select your pritnter output name

(2) Click Print Immediately icon

Now...you must generate IV document using transaction code MRIS

 

Its working

entry.title: Re: How to transport Build Workzone Site to another subac...
entry.content:
@dheerajahuja000 

The help page below explains how to transport Build Work Zone contents. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/transporting-content-via-sap-cloud-transport-management-service

You have two options for transporting contents: one option is to manually select each content item, and the other is to transport the entire site. When transporting an entire site, all associated contents—including roles, spaces, and pages—will be included in a single transport request. Please note that apps are an exception—you must transport apps (e.g., UI5 apps deployed to Cloud Foundry) individually.

entry.title: Re: Public Sector well-represented at the NA Regulated Industries Partner Summit, 2024
entry.content: Thank you for sharing, Sally. The success of the summit is 100% a result of bringing the right teams together. With Sales, COE, Industry, LoB and Alliances gathering to ensure we create a win, win experience.  We appreciate your contribution!

entry.title: Re: Error in updating order in OData V4 Model from a CAP Project.
entry.content: why don't you show us what the value is in debug mode?

entry.title: Duplicate MPN created for same internal material no and manufacturer combination.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Do we any validation/ Message to check duplicate combination of internal material and manufacturer while creating a MPN material.

Example - I have created a MPN -10000001 with internal material - 400001 and manufacturer - 3000006. Now I am creating  MPN -10000002 with same internal material and manufacturer, system is allowing. I want a error message here.

 

Thanks,

Manish

entry.title: Re: FM or BAPI for VF03, FB03 attachment list download
entry.content: It has been asked so many times, and there are many possible solutions. As you are asking about BAPI, there's only one which is BAPI_REL_GETRELATIONS to read the list of attachments. For reading the IDs of attachments, and for reading each attachment you may search the Web: "GOS" "attachment" "github" site:sap.com (one ABAP GitHub project)

entry.title: Re: FM or BAPI for VF03, FB03 attachment list download
entry.content: Note that GOS attachments may not always be stored in BDS.

entry.title: Re: Using Integration Suite API's with Basic Auth
entry.content:
Hello @Robin_Walther ,

This is your Universal ID password and you should use your S-User ID password. Which is most probably different password. 

If you use your S-User with your password. It should be ok. 

Best Regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: JSON Web Encryption in SAP CPI using public Key

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts

Anyone can help?.

 

Thank.

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content: @Shruthinr Okay, but as said in the answer, did you try this: "click on the "Linked" tab first, then go back to the "Not linked" tab, before the blue "Link" button appeared on the lower right" (of the Linked tab)?

entry.title: Re: Improved Incoterm Handling in SAP TM

Many thanks for informing & explianing this excellent feature of integration on incoterm with TM .We are trying to use it in one of our projects.

Please inform whether this requires advanced TM.

Thanks in advance !!

With regards,

Mrinal

entry.title: Certificate file content disappeared from the ICM trace level 3 in ABAP 7.58
entry.content:
Hello,

I see different content in the ICM trace level 3 (transaction code SMICM) concerning the certificates. In a system with ABAP 7.52, I could see the certificate contents (below in base 64, between BEGIN CERTIFICATE and END CERTIFICATE), but I can't see them in another system with ABAP 7.58.

Do you know if there's a profile parameter is implied or the feature has changed between 7.52 and 7.58?

Thank you!

Sandra

NB 1: I have said trace level 3, but it's possible that level 2 is sufficient (in ABAP 7.52) to obtain the content of the certificate.

NB 2: I have also posted the question/issue here: Certificate file content disappeared from the ICM trace in ABAP 7.58 · Issue #6 · sandraros/zcerti (github.com)

ABAP 7.52 ICM trace level 2:

[Thr 139675634906880] CCL[VERIFY]: Cli-00000011: Verification result of SSL server certificate (failed)
[Thr 139675634906880] Verification result header:
[Thr 139675634906880] Verification errors
[Thr 139675634906880] The chain of certificates is incomplete or untrusted, missing certificate of
[Thr 139675634906880] CN=DigiCert Global Root CA, OU=www.digicert.com, O=DigiCert Inc, C=US
[Thr 139675634906880] Verified certificate:
[Thr 139675634906880] Subject: CN=github.com, O="GitHub, Inc.", L=San Francisco, SP=California, C=US
[Thr 139675634906880] Issuer: CN=DigiCert TLS Hybrid ECC SHA384 2020 CA1, O=DigiCert Inc, C=US
[Thr 139675634906880] Serial Number: 0C:D0:A8:BE:C6:32:CF:E6:45:EC:A0:A9:B0:84:FB:1C
[Thr 139675634906880] -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
[Thr 139675634906880] MIIFajCCBPGgAwIBAgIQDNCovsYyz+ZF7KCpsIT7HDAKBggqhkjOPQQDAzBWMQsw
...
[Thr 139675634906880] 3jSZCpwfqOHBdlxi9ASgKTU+wg0qw3FqtfQ31OwLYFdxh0MlNk/HwkjRSWgCMFbQ
[Thr 139675634906880] vMkXEPvNvv4t30K6xtpG26qmZ+6OiISBIIXMljWnsiYR1gyZnTzIg3AQSw4Vmw==
[Thr 139675634906880] -----END CERTIFICATE-----
[Thr 139675634906880] Used signer certificate:
[Thr 139675634906880] Subject: CN=DigiCert TLS Hybrid ECC SHA384 2020 CA1, O=DigiCert Inc, C=US
[Thr 139675634906880] Issuer: CN=DigiCert Global Root CA, OU=www.digicert.com, O=DigiCert Inc, C=US
[Thr 139675634906880] Serial Number: 07:F2:F3:5C:87:A8:77:AF:7A:EF:E9:47:99:35:25:BD
[Thr 139675634906880] -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
[Thr 139675634906880] MIIEFzCCAv+gAwIBAgIQB/LzXIeod6967+lHmTUlvTANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQwFADBh
...
[Thr 139675634906880] xRqhqjn1VtvChMQ1H3Dau0bwhr9kAMQ+959GG50jBbl9s08PqUU643QwmA==
[Thr 139675634906880] -----END CERTIFICATE-----
[Thr 139675634906880] Certificate verification result:
[Thr 139675634906880] Certificate:
[Thr 139675634906880] Subject: CN=github.com, O="GitHub, Inc.", L=San Francisco, SP=California, C=US
[Thr 139675634906880] Verification result:
[Thr 139675634906880] Status: Not successful
[Thr 139675634906880] SignerStatus: Not successful

ABAP 7.58 ICM trace level 3:

[Thr 139843524822784] CCL[VERIFY]: Certificate verification result (failed)
[Thr 139843524822784] BEGIN VERIFICATION RESULT
[Thr 139843524822784] # Messages
[Thr 139843524822784] INFO: Verification time - Tue Apr 2 12:53:02 2024
[Thr 139843524822784] ERROR: The chain of certificates is incomplete or untrusted, missing certificate of [A6:CF:64:DB] CN=USERTrust ECC Certification Authority, O=The USERTRUST Network, L=J
[Thr 139843524822784] # Summary
[Thr 139843524822784] #01 Certificate (End Entity): VALID
[Thr 139843524822784] Subject: CN=github.com
[Thr 139843524822784] Issuer: CN=Sectigo ECC Domain Validation Secure Server CA, O=Sectigo Limited, L=Salford, SP=Greater Manchester, C=GB
[Thr 139843524822784] Fingerprint (SHA256): FD:6E:9B:0E:F3:98:BC:D9:04:C3:B2:EC:16:7A:7B:0F:DA:72:01:C9:03:C5:3A:6A:6A:E5:D0:41:43:63:EF:65
[Thr 139843524822784] Validity: Thu Mar 7 00:00:00 2024 / Fri Mar 7 23:59:59 2025
[Thr 139843524822784] PKI validation: FAILED: Validation of dependents - Issuer Certificate (Issuer - Only Invalid Certificates Found)
[Thr 139843524822784] #02 Certificate (Issuer): VALID
[Thr 139843524822784] Subject: CN=Sectigo ECC Domain Validation Secure Server CA, O=Sectigo Limited, L=Salford, SP=Greater Manchester, C=GB
[Thr 139843524822784] Issuer: CN=USERTrust ECC Certification Authority, O=The USERTRUST Network, L=Jersey City, SP=New Jersey, C=US
[Thr 139843524822784] Fingerprint (SHA256): 61:E9:73:75:E9:F6:DA:98:2F:F5:C1:9E:2F:94:E6:6C:4E:35:B6:83:7C:E3:B9:14:D2:24:5C:7F:5F:65:82:5F
[Thr 139843524822784] Validity: Fri Nov 2 00:00:00 2018 / Tue Dec 31 23:59:59 2030
[Thr 139843524822784] PKI validation: FAILED: Validation of dependents - Issuer Certificate (Issuer - Only Invalid Certificates Found)
[Thr 139843524822784] #03 Certificate (Issuer): VALID
[Thr 139843524822784] Subject: CN=USERTrust ECC Certification Authority, O=The USERTRUST Network, L=Jersey City, SP=New Jersey, C=US
[Thr 139843524822784] Issuer: CN=AAA Certificate Services, O=Comodo CA Limited, L=Salford, SP=Greater Manchester, C=GB
[Thr 139843524822784] Fingerprint (SHA256): A6:CF:64:DB:B4:C8:D5:FD:19:CE:48:89:60:68:DB:03:B5:33:A8:D1:33:6C:62:56:A8:7D:00:CB:B3:DE:F3:EA
[Thr 139843524822784] Validity: Tue Mar 12 00:00:00 2019 / Sun Dec 31 23:59:59 2028
[Thr 139843524822784] PKI validation: FAILED: Validation of dependents - Issuer Certificate (ERROR: Issuer - No Certificates Found)
[Thr 139843524822784] # Results
[Thr 139843524822784] Certificate Result #01: FAILED
[Thr 139843524822784] Certificate (End Entity): [FD:6E:9B:0E] CN=github.com
[Thr 139843524822784] Trusted: -
[Thr 139843524822784] Policy: -
[Thr 139843524822784] Revocation: Untested
[Thr 139843524822784] OCSP: Untested
[Thr 139843524822784] Issuer: ERROR: Issuer - Only Invalid Certificates Found

[Thr 139843524822784] Signature: Succeeded
[Thr 139843524822784] KeyUsage: Untested

entry.title: Re: Differences Between Specification Management in ERP-S/4HANA and EPD
entry.content:
Hello

very interesting helpful and very well written Blog. Many thanks or publishing this. One question regarding phrases:

In the "old" world a phrase can have any length, any language, uses a status etc.

Can you highlight a little bit: what is the structure in SAPA EPD?

On the top: the old world uses "active" ans "passive" phrase libraries etc.

The "old" world are using e.g. "identifiers" a lot to describe a specification. Is there any similat "counterpart" in SAP EPD?

With best wishes

C.B.

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX problem downloading file
entry.content: @oliver_am I created the issue 1213 for you. https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx/issues/1215

entry.title: Re: SVT Production scenario
entry.content:
Hello

i am sorry; Since i am using SVT (now i believe since 2007). the "PRO" scenario was always a "nightmare" (from business point of view and IT point of view).

If somebody is raising the hand and ask you; why was Y tracked but not Z.. to get the answer in most of the practical cases you need more than one day.

There are to many pitfalls to list to help you.

Small hint: you "log" is saying that you track without history

These are the check points you can may be use

1.) based on your story: for any "relevant" material  to consider: we have entries in CCRCT_EHS_COMP

2.) Do you use the "SVT material class" on material level? 

3.) many entries in CCRCC_FILTER can have effect on tracking result

4.) In many discussion with many people: it is important to understand you "SAP Scenario". Which SAP releae do you use? which support package etc.

The reason is: under some conditions the "business" can decide: this object should not been tracked (i skip details). BUt this is only possible starting with a specific SAP release.

IMPORTANT: You must read the SVT OSS Consulting note CAREFFULLY. In this Consulting note SAP tries to explain the "algorithm" which is used: is ther something to track yes or no etc.

Generally we can differentiate like:

  • the production is refering to what chemists are calling a "mixing"
  • the production is generating ONE objects
  • the production is generaitng a "main" objects and "byproducts"

For a "mixing" there is no need of "tracking" as there is no new chemistry generated.

What type of example do you have?

As a hint: your log is saying that tracking is done without "history". You should not go on like this. But you can accept the risk as well.

C.B.

PS: regarding SVT we have a "Blog" in place; but this "Blog" can not help you in your specific situation. Sorry

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANa for Product Compliance Data Migration app...
entry.content:
Hello Paulo

I am sorry. Some of your assumptions are according to my understanding wrong

In SAP S/4 HANA 2023 SVT exists but can not really be used. Check the "Roadmap" explorer to get more insight here

The same is true for "DG" and to certain par of "SDS" as well

For SDS: you can use the tool (best knowledge !) to dipatch the SDS but you can not create a SDS. The "Label" generation will be done any how using a "Partner Solution".

As well: to get more insight for DG and SDS part: please check the roadmap.

On top: this blog might be of interest:

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/new-sap-ehs-management-for-beginners/ba-p/13561840

and

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/sap-quot-ehs-quot-product-structure-r-3-lt-gt-s-4/ba-p/13647512

With best wishes

C.B

entry.title: Error opening 'Guided development' for analytical list page
entry.content:
Hello community
I created an 'analitycal list page' and it works correctly. However, when I right click and click on 'open guided development' it does not open and displays the messages below in vs code and also in business application studio:

 

Does anyone know how to fix this error?

entry.title: SAP Inside Track PORTO 2024
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track PORTO will have it first edition in PORTO (Portugal) on September 28, 2024.

Look here in the SAP Community Event Calendar.

The event is present in several countries around the world. Its organizers are active members of the SAP Community with the aim of sharing knowledge and strengthening professionals among the participants.

The event has been in existence for over 15 years and has been held in several cities around the world.

Learn more about how to hold your SAP Inside Track event in your city through this LINK.

Inscription:

Includes:

  • Access to the event;
  • Access to all the lectures;
  • Candidates can be received to participate as a volunteer of the event;
  • Admissions to the event, here in the Link 

 

Speaker:

Take this opportunity to share your knowledge and help us make this event even better.

Applications for lectures can be made at this LINK

    • A proposal with the title theme and a synopsis should be sent with the subject SITFor
    • The lecture time is a maximum of 40 minutes.
    • The last day for submitting proposals is  Aug  25, 2024.
    • Wait for the contact of our team until Aug 30 with confirmation.

Event’s place

Waiting confirmation.

On September 28 2024  (Saturday)

 

Agenda

8 am – Reception

9 am to 12 pm – Presentations / lectures

12h to 13:30 – Lunch

14h to 17:30 – Lectures

17:30 to 18:00 – Closing session

 

Organization Team

Manuel Robalinho ( @MRobalinho )
Arnaldo Calçada
Pedro Rodrigues
Pedro Marques
Pedro Vieira

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
After three days without any problems I'm not able to start the docker image (WSL on Win11 with 32GB) anymore 😢

HDB: starting

27.04.2024 13:26:12
Start
OK

27.04.2024 13:26:26
StartWait
FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
HDB: the start command failed, exit code=2
The service HDB has failed to start and initialization is blocked until the problem is resolved
You can try your luck 10 times until initialization is terminated
Hint: docker containers can be joined by: docker exec -it <name> bash
Hint: Container must have at least 16GB RAM available
Hint: Container must have at least 70GB DISK free

No idea what has changed since yesterday.

By using our referral code during registration, you gain access to a plethora of opportunities to earn XP points faster than ever before. entry.title: Re: How can we use a odata connection of datasphere to cr...
entry.content: Cool , Thanks for your response！ In this case, I'm using the ODATA API to connecting datasphere in SAC. Fristly I use the API_URL[https://<tenant_url>/api/v1/dwc/catalog] to create ODATA connection in SAC. Then it was successfuly,But I can't choose any tables, views and analytic models when I create dataset in SAC. I only can see two tables which is space&assets. That means I can't choose any tables, views and analytic models. But If I use the API_URL[https://<tenant_url>/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/<space_id>/<asset_id>] to create connection in sac that I can only create a dataset with this connection. that means, every connection only can choose a [table/view/analytic model] when i create dataset in sac So Do we have any other solution to solve this situation. May you can browse this website: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/7a453609c8694b029493e7d87e0de60a.html

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS TRANSACTION IN SAP S/4HANA CLOUD, PUBLIC EDI...
entry.content:
Hi @1028_melle ,

You can check the business transaction for each document type in CBC: 101522 (Define Document Types).

To see the list of standard document type settings, you can find it in SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: Is it possible, to hide a slide with macro actions from the simulation but not documentation?
entry.content:
I have a simulation, where I have pre-built the slide for documentation but I need to hide it from simulation. I cannot use jump target, due to, if an end user skips around in the simulation, the jumped slide shows. 

I have tried removing Simulation actions such as highlight and bubble visibility. This works but the action of mouse clicking still shows. 

Is there a solution that does not involve jump target?

entry.title: Re: .Error message showing no data for the selection J_1IG_MSGS0006
entry.content: I have come across the same issue or error, for me this note is not opening, could you please suggest what we need to do?

entry.title: Re: Minecraft - Any players?
entry.content:
Absolutely, I've been into Minecraft for a while now, especially the Java edition. It's such a versatile game with endless possibilities.

Regarding the Minecraft APK, I believe that's for the mobile version, right? I haven't tried it yet, but I've been thinking of giving it a go lately. How about you?

entry.title: Boost Your XP Points with Karak Invite Code 'OGX5F'
entry.content: Are you looking for a way to level up faster in Karak? Look no further! By using the invite code 'OGX5F', you can supercharge your experience points and progress through the game at lightning speed. Whether you're a seasoned player looking to reach new heights or a newcomer eager to jumpstart your journey, this invite code is your ticket to unlocking a wealth of XP rewards. Don't miss out on this opportunity to accelerate your advancement and dominate the leaderboards. Enter code 'OGX5F' today and watch your XP soar!
